description: Given matrix v, compute the product of each column (axis=0).
Apply the tanh activation function to every element using vectorization.
Compute gradient of hinge loss with respect to weights.
Implement an IIR low-pass filter forward pass using scan.
Implement and JIT compile a residual block: relu(x @ W1 + b1) @ W2 + b2 + x.
Use vmap to compute the outer product of each pair of corresponding row vectors in two matrices.
